title: In Support of Sustainable Export Earnings For National Growth
description: At the 2022 Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) annual conference held in Lagos on Saturday, with the theme: ‘Boosting Domestic Capacity For Sustainable Export Earnings”.
html: At the 2022 Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) annual conference held in Lagos on Saturday, with the theme: ‘Boosting Domestic Capacity For Sustainable Export Earnings”.
